scripts.postinstall: npm install --ignore-scripts --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && echo '✅ Frontend built' && cp -r frontend/dist backend/public && echo '✅ Copied to backend/public' && ls backend/public && cd backend && npm run prisma:generate && echo '✅ Prisma generated' && npm run prisma:deploy && echo '✅ DB pushed'
